---
title: "ChainLink"
search: false
format:
  html:
    meta:
      description: "A compact word-chain game prototype by Ben Brintz."
---

::: {=html}
<style>
html {
  background-color: #030a1c;
}
body {
  min-height: 100vh;
  background-color: #030a1c;
  background-image:
    radial-gradient(circle at 78% 70%, rgba(255, 120, 40, 0.18), transparent 42%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 22% 18%, rgba(102, 195, 255, 0.18), transparent 36%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 52% 112%, rgba(102, 195, 255, 0.12), transparent 44%),
    linear-gradient(145deg, #030a1c 0%, #071126 42%, #102047 74%, #061126 100%);
  background-attachment: fixed;
  color: #f8fbff;
}

h1.title {
  color: #f8fbff;
}

.chainlink-intro {
  max-width: 760px;
  color: #dbe6ff;
  line-height: 1.65;
  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
}

.chainlink-frame {
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 8px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(185, 206, 255, 0.24);
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
  box-shadow: 0 18px 46px rgba(0,0,0,0.28);
}

iframe#fullpage {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: min(720px, 78svh);
  border: none;
}
</style>
:::

::: {.chainlink-intro}
A daily word-chain prototype: start from the clue word, make a sequence of constrained guesses, and try to land the full chain cleanly.
:::

<div class="chainlink-frame">
  <iframe
    id="fullpage"
    title="ChainLink game"
    src="cl.html">
  </iframe>
</div>
